Driven by the belief that impossibilities inspire us, we continually push beyond conventional limits. Our cutting-edge hardware and software are crafted to elevate your operations and reshape your world.

about.text:
About Us - Adaptive Recognition | Image Capturing and Analytics
Show more
Read more
View product
View report
Drag
Skip to content
Pioneering a Safer and Smarter Future
with Intelligent Character Recognition
We transform traffic cameras into intelligent eyes, ID scanners
into trusted guardians, and everyday codes into valuable
data points.
Adaptive Recognition
tackles complex challenges
in traffic management, security, and identity verification
with expert solutions, making the
complex intuitive
, and the
impossible achievable.
Our Story:
From Innovation to
Industry Leadership
Adaptive Recognition is a leading developer and manufacturer of image
processing technology based on Optical Character Recognition (OCR).
We specialize in creating reliable hardware and software for a wide range of
applications:
Traffic Management:
Our ANPR cameras and software play a vital role in
streamlining traffic flow, improving security, and enforcing regulations.
Identity Document Verification:
Our innovative passport readers and ID
scanners ensure secure and efficient identification for border control, passenger
screening, and various self-service applications.
Industrial Code Recognition:
We go beyond traditional OCR, offering solutions
for deciphering industrial codes on containers, railways, and other assets.
Our Purpose
Building a Safer, Smarter Future Through
the Power of Intelligent Character Recognition
Read about our purpose and history
What Matters Tomorrow is Developed Today
At Adaptive Recognition, we believe the key to a safer, smarter future lies in anticipating industry needs and developing groundbreaking OCR technology today. Our exceptional team of 300+ minds is the driving force behind this belief. Their combined expertise in engineering, innovation, and problem-solving enables us to address current challenges and anticipate future ones. Our forward-thinking translates into real-world impact with global deployments, a network of trusted partners, and industry-leading technology.
Installations based on our
OCR products worldwide
300K
Network of trusted
prime partners
The number of different license
plate types our technology can
recognize
60K
Strategically located offices
across three continents
Our
values
Adaptability:
Embracing change and opportunity
We embrace adaptability as a core value and understand that the needs of
our customers and partners, as well as technological advancements, require
us to be flexible and responsive. Our agile approach allows us to quickly adapt
and innovate, ensuring our hardware and software stays at the forefront of the
industry.
Innovation:
Redefining what is possible
We foster a culture of innovation, encouraging our employees to think outside
the box and push the boundaries of whatâs possible in image processing
technology. This relentless pursuit of innovation drives us to develop cutting-
edge technology that redefines the possibilities within the field.
Reliability:
Unwavering performance
We are committed to delivering high-quality, reliable, and accurate hardware
and software that exceeds our clientsâ expectations. Our cameras are some
of the most accurate in the market, and we maintain rigorous quality control
processes to ensure that our solutions consistently perform at the highest level.
Customer Centricity
Success through understanding
We put our customers at the center of everything we do, working closely with
them to understand their needs and develop solutions that meet their specific
requirements. We believe in building long-term partnerships with our customers,
ensuring their success is our success.
An endless
evolution
Our milestones define our history â and our commitment
today defines our future milestones.
1991
1991 â The foundation of ARH.
Two brothers, a shared vision, laid the foundation for Adaptive Recognition.
1992
1992 â Releasing our first license plate recognition software
Releasing our first license plate recognition software, known today as CarmenÂ®
1994
